ctc_strategy.narrative: Given the substantial savings under the New Regime, it is advisable to restructure compensation packages to leverage the benefits of Section 80C and Section 80CCD(2) for employees. This not only reduces tax liabilities but also enhances employee satisfaction. Additionally, exploring the potential for CTC restructuring by Rs 22,880.00 could further optimize tax efficiencies, particularly under Section 115BAC, which allows for deductions on salaries up to a certain limit.
